notes: The state-level external-cause mortality (V01-Y89) preparation pipeline: read into the eMKF layout, then the population-group recode (subsetting IF that drops the 'All' rows, six IF/THEN relabels of race/Hispanic-origin categories to short codes), RENAME of Population_Group->Population and Year_Code->Year, and a catx(':', Population, State) grouping, finished with PROC SORT and a PROC PRINT preview. The INFILE ... DSD read is kept; the first 30 real rows (year 1999, five states, all six population groups) are embedded inline via DATALINES so all recode branches and the subsetting IF fire. 30 rows in -> 25 after dropping 'All'.
